summary:
Fixed: removed blind trust of X-Forwarded-For.

Details:
ratelimiter.ts
– Re-implemented getClientIp to ignore user-supplied X-Forwarded-For unless validated.
– Uses socket.remoteAddress (strips ::ffff: prefix) so rotating the header no longer resets limits.

All tests now pass:
$ ./test.sh
PASS: Rate limiter is not vulnerable to header spoofing
